ensemble.note: Validated on both halves of the holdout independently (split-holdout consistency check). Best credible strategy composition found across ~15M+ combinations tested over multiple search rounds (2024-2026 H4 EURUSD, ~2.5 years real data). Supersedes the earlier RSI+Stochastic-only ensemble.
ensemble.production_note: All three overlays are now config.yaml defaults (risk.max_hold_bars, risk.use_volatility_filter, risk.use_trailing_stop, ...) applied automatically by build_config()/LiveTrader. In order of addition: (1) 15-bar time stop, (2) ATR-95th-percentile volatility regime filter, (3) trailing stop (0.4R start/0.4R distance) -- the single best individual improvement found in the whole project, validated robust across a wide start/distance neighborhood (0.3-0.75R), not a lucky single value. See scripts/test_friend_filters.py, scripts/test_volatility_and_mtf_filters.py, and scripts/test_final_ideas.py for the full comparisons.
